page: OVHcloud c3-128 is a compute-optimized server instance powered by an AMD EPYC Milan processor. It features 64 dedicated physical cores and 64 vCPUs running at 2.3 GHz on the x86_64 architecture, with a single thread per core. The hardware configuration includes 128 GB of RAM, providing a resource density of 2.0 GB per core. Local storage is provided by a 400 GB NVMe SSD, and the network interface delivers a baseline bandwidth of 8 Gbps.

In benchmark evaluations, the c3-128 demonstrates strong multi-core capabilities, placing in the top 10% for stress-ng multi-core CPU performance, PassMark CPU score, and Geekbench multi-core score. Memory performance is also notable, with cached small-block read-only memory bandwidth and PassMark memory scores reaching the top 10%. The instance excels in parallel processing tasks, as evidenced by top-tier results in multi-threaded bzip3 decompression, software compilation with Clang, and ray tracing.

The server architecture presents a clear tradeoff, offering high compute density and dedicated CPU resources at the expense of a lower RAM-to-vCPU ratio. This makes it highly cost-efficient for compute-bound workloads rather than memory-intensive databases. It is well-suited for parallel processing tasks, software compilation, static web serving, Redis key-value operations, and moderate LLM prompt processing.
description: OVHcloud c3-128 is a compute-optimized server instance built on the x86_64 architecture and powered by a dedicated AMD EPYC Milan processor. It features 64 physical cores running at 2.3 GHz, paired with 128 GB of RAM and a 400 GB NVMe SSD. The instance delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 8 Gbps. In benchmark testing, the c3-128 achieves top-tier performance in multi-core CPU execution, software compilation, and memory bandwidth, though its 2 GB of RAM per core represents a tradeoff for memory-heavy applications. This hardware profile is highly cost-efficient for compute-intensive workloads such as parallel processing, software compilation, static web serving, and Redis operations.
og_description: OVHcloud c3-128 is a compute-optimized server featuring 64 dedicated AMD EPYC Milan cores, 128 GB of RAM, and a 400 GB NVMe SSD, delivering top-tier multi-core CPU and memory bandwidth performance.
meta_description: OVHcloud c3-128 is a compute-optimized server with 64 dedicated AMD EPYC Milan cores, 128 GB RAM, and a 400 GB NVMe SSD for intensive workloads.
tagline: A dedicated 64-core AMD EPYC compute-optimized instance with NVMe storage, engineered for high-throughput parallel processing and multi-threaded workloads.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated AMD EPYC Milan physical cores running at 2.3 GHz
128 GB of RAM and 400 GB of local NVMe SSD storage
Top-tier multi-core CPU, memory bandwidth, and software compilation performance
8 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with one public IPv4 address
Optimized for parallel processing, Redis operations, and static web serving
